TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mayl‚Äôux, title = Mayl‚Äôux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mayl‚Äôux} }

S.FORM: Mayl'ux Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Mayl'ux a niyaro', 62 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 143 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 127 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 72%, Saysiyat 12%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: maj…ĺ °o~u~ux itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u maj…ĺ °o~u~ux a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, sajsijat **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Mayl'ux Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Mayl'ux a niyaro', 62 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 143 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 127 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 72%, Saysiyat 12%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: maj…ĺ °o~u~ux itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u maj…ĺ °o~u~ux a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, sajsijat **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
